fieldDescription: Select a preset to override all settings. Choose Custom to use individual settings from the Configuration tab.

defaultValue: Uses your configured values from the Configuration tab.
[NOTE:] Slider values below only apply when the [Custom] preset is selected on the [Presets] tab. Other presets use their own hardcoded values.

secondaryValue: -- None --,Vanilla Values,Recommended Values,Hardcore Values,Restore Custom Values
fieldDescription: Select a preset to copy its values into the sliders below. Only works when Custom is the active preset.
Percentage chance for cruisers to be replaced with frigates
Percentage chance for cruisers to be replaced with destroyers

defaultValue: Remaining percentage stays as cruiser (auto-calculated from sliders above).

fieldDescription: Percentage chance for capitals to be replaced with frigates

defaultValue: Remaining percentage stays as capital (auto-calculated from sliders above).

defaultValue: [TIP:] Use the in-game [Faction Manager] to browse all loaded factions and toggle blacklist status. Open your [Intel Screen] (Missions tab) to find it.
